generated_assessment.reasoning: Baseline -347 is already strongly opposed, so the adversary seeks to reinforce (ALIGNED). The profile's very high agreeableness-trust (79th) but also high neuroticism-anxiety (70th) and anger/hostility (70th) make it modestly receptive to a T1 headline misframing that amplifies threat and elite distrust—consistent with the extraversion/assertiveness deficit (14th) that reduces counterarguing. However, the atomic, hours-long burst rarely produces more than a small reinforcement; a shift of 13 points (movement ≈13) reflects slight hardening via confirmatory salience without crossing into a stronger commitment band.
